name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual payroll data handling causes compliance delays. We automate tax compliance reporting instead of manual data entry and filing.
problem_solved: manual payroll data handling leads to compliance delays
